comments:
ScrollState - scroll position and behavior atoms.

Models scroll position, direction, velocity, and snap points
for scroll-driven animations and infinite scroll patterns.

declarations.comments: Create scroll progress from position and bounds
declarations.title: scrollProgress

declarations.comments: Is at start of scroll area?
declarations.title: isAtStart

declarations.comments: Is at end of scroll area?
declarations.title: isAtEnd

declarations.comments: Is near end? (within 10% - for infinite scroll trigger)
declarations.title: isNearEnd

declarations.comments: Scroll velocity in pixels per second
declarations.title: ScrollVelocity

declarations.comments: Initial scroll state (at origin, no bounds)
declarations.title: initialScrollState

declarations.comments: Update scroll position and compute direction
declarations.title: updateScrollPosition

declarations.comments: Should load more content? (infinite scroll trigger)
declarations.title: shouldLoadMore

declarations.comments: Distance to end of scroll area (pixels)
declarations.title: distanceToEnd

name: Hydrogen.Schema.Reactive.ScrollState
